notes: BOSS RUSH — first single-player mode. Solo fight against THE CORE: a giant 3-layered polygon at arena center whose attacks ARE the song. Phase FSM follows verse → build-up → drop. Kicks fire shockwaves, snares fire telegraphed line lasers, drops open the core for a damage window. New Rhythm Shield system: every shot/dash is classified vs the nearest beat — PERFECT (<80ms, 1.8× dmg), GOOD (<160ms, 1.3× dmg), MISS (shield wipes, 1.0× dmg). End-of-fight S/A/B rank screen scoring sync%. 5 hand-crafted boss tracks: The Core, Pulse Reactor, Glass Cathedral, Stomp Engine, Final Wave. New Settings slider: Beat Offset (ms) for audio sync calibration. PLAY → SINGLE PLAYER now opens BOSS RUSH (was 'soon').
